TextView.android:text:
Hydration is the process of drinking enough fluids to keep your body healthy, energized, and functioning properly.

 💧Drink More Water
 Water helps regulate body temperature, transport nutrients, and prevent dehydration.

 🥤Choose Healthy Drinks
 Drink water, milk, or unsweetened beverages instead of sugary drinks.

🍉 Eat Water-Rich Foods
 Fruits and vegetables like watermelon, cucumber, and oranges help keep you hydrated.

🏃 Stay Hydrated During Exercise
Drink water before, during, and after physical activity to replace lost fluids.

☀️ Drink More in Hot Weather
 Your body loses more water in the heat, so increase your fluid intake to stay hydrated.
